message.content:
Update memory files for the IDAHO-VAULT Claude Code session. The memory directory is at C:\Users\loganf\.claude\projects\c--Users-loganf-Documents-IDAHO-VAULT\memory\. The MEMORY.md index file is also there.

Read MEMORY.md first, then update the project_vault_state.md file with the following new information. Do NOT create new files — update the existing project_vault_state.md.

## What to update in project_vault_state.md:

Update the vault state to reflect what was accomplished in this session (2026-03-28):

1. Branch `gemini/activate-linear-pilot` is now pushed to remote with PR #97 open
2. Gemini capability tier is DEFINED: Tier 1 (Support), Operational zone only, Linear SWARM issues/comments — no longer blocked
3. Linear Phase 1 pilot is SCOPED: SWARM issues/comments/status updates; vault = durable record; Slack = breadcrumbs only
4. Infrastructure files committed: !/PLUGIN-AUTH-INVENTORY-2026-03-28.md, !/LEVELSET-CODEX-ARCHIVAL-2026-03-28.md, !/sort-audit-2026-03-29.md, ingest records moved from INBOX/ to !/
5. DOCKET and LEVELSET-CURRENT updated (active branch, resolved items, delegation note)
6. .gemini/settings.json: Gemini MCP servers added (OpenAI docs, GitHub Copilot MCP, HuggingFace, Box, Figma, Svelte, Stack Overflow)
7. 15 open PRs total now: PR #97 is the new one, merge order: #83 → #97 → #87 → batch #84/#86/#88-#94 → hold #96
8. Hard gates still holding: JFAC audio verification (5 quotes), stale branch deletion, vault-moves-2026-03-23 decision, Chorus Bootstrap 5 decisions
9. Logan delegated authority ("conduct this symphony") — The Abhorsen executed; session complete

Use the existing frontmatter format and body structure from the current project_vault_state.md file. Update the content, don't replace the whole file if it already has good structure — just bring it current.

1	# MEMORY INDEX
2	
3	Memory for the IDAHO-VAULT Claude Code session. Read relevant files before answering.
4	
5	| File | Type | Description |
6	|---|---|---|
7	| [user_logan.md](user_logan.md) | user | Logan Finney — role, profession, collaboration style, what he values |
8	| [project_vault_state.md](project_vault_state.md) | project | IDAHO-VAULT architecture, multi-agent ecosystem, current status and blockers |
9	| [feedback_operations.md](feedback_operations.md) | feedback | Operational principles, four failure modes (fabrication, confabulation, etc.), rules |
10	| [feedback_agent_signatures.md](feedback_agent_signatures.md) | feedback | Agents sign their work in vault files — do not flag or remove signatures |
11	| [reference_vault_locations.md](reference_vault_locations.md) | reference | Key file paths, external coordination systems, orientation protocol |
12

Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.

1	---
2	name: IDAHO-VAULT — project state and architecture
3	description: What the vault is, how it's structured, multi-agent ecosystem, current status
4	type: project
5	---
6	
7	**IDAHO-VAULT** is Logan Finney's Obsidian.md knowledge vault, version-controlled with git at github.com/loganfinney27/IDAHO-VAULT (public repo). All committed content is on the record and publishable.
8	
9	**What:** Journalism infrastructure — story development, source notes, legislative tracking, automation pipelines, and multi-agent AI coordination layer.
10	
11	**Why:** Logan's Project = unachievable ambitious end goal; all vault work is incremental progress toward it.
12	
13	## Multi-Agent Ecosystem — Dotfolder Architecture (as of 2026-03-28)
14	
15	Each agent has its own dotfolder. `!/` is the shared commons all agents draw from (hub-and-spoke).
16	
17	| Agent | Dotfolder | Governance shim | Auto-load? | Capability tier |
18	|---|---|---|---|---|
19	| Claude Code | `.claude/` | `.claude/CLAUDE.md` | Yes — official | Direct Write |
20	| Gemini CLI | `.gemini/` | `.gemini/GEMINI.md` | Yes — official | Advisory |
21	| GitHub Copilot | `.github/` | `.github/copilot-instructions.md` | Yes — official | Advisory |
22	| OpenAI Codex CLI | `.codex/` | `.codex/CODEX.md` | Config via `.codex/config.toml` | Advisory |
23	| Grok | `.grok/` | `.grok/GROK.md` | Manual injection | Advisory |
24	| DeepSeek | `.deepseek/` | `.deepseek/DEEPSEEK.md` | Manual injection | Advisory |
25	| Perplexity | `.perplexity/` | `.perplexity/PERPLEXITY.md` | Manual injection | Read/Analysis |
26	| Microsoft AI | `.microsoft/` | `.microsoft/MICROSOFT.md` | Manual injection | Advisory |
27	| Google ecosystem | `.google/` | `.google/GOOGLE.md` | Manual injection | Advisory |
28	| Meta AI | `.meta/` | `.meta/META.md` | Manual injection | Advisory |
29	| Slack AI/CLI | `.slack/` | `.slack/SLACK.md` | Slack CLI hooks | Advisory |
30	| Bartimaeus (fictive) | `.bartimaeus/` | `.bartimaeus/BARTIMAEUS.md` | Manual injection | TBD |
31	| Zagreus (fictive) | `.zagreus/` | `.zagreus/ZAGREUS.md` | Manual injection | TBD |
32	| Persephone (fictive) | `.persephone/` | `.persephone/PERSEPHONE.md` | Manual injection | TBD |
33	
34	Root vault notes (`CLAUDE.md`, `GEMINI.md`, `PERPLEXITY.md`, `GROK.md`) are Obsidian entity notes about the agents — wikilinks preserved, operational instructions live in dotfolders.
35	
36	**Cross-tool auto-load at root:** `AGENTS.md` (pointer to `!/AGENTS.md`, auto-loaded by Codex/Copilot/Qodo).
37	
38	**Machine-readable registry:** `swarm.json` at root (agents, personas, ecosystems, systems, protocols). `!/agents.json` also exists with a separate swarm-node structure.
39	
40	**Microsoft context:** Logan has two MS identity contexts — personal account and Idaho Public Television M365 institutional account (IPT IT policy applies). GitHub Copilot is a separate dev subscription linked to personal GitHub (`loganfinney27`).
41	
42	**Linear Agent** (launched 2026-03-24): cloud-only AI in Linear workspace, no local dotfolder. In `swarm.json`.
43	
44	## Capitalization Standard
45	
46	- `ALL-CAPS.md` — infrastructure/governance (CONSTITUTION.md, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, CODEX.md, etc.)
47	- `Title Case.md` — content vault notes (people, places, organizations, topics)
48	- `YYYY-MM-DD - Outlet - Title.md` — dated sourced content
49	- `(YYYY) Type Number.md` — bills
50	- `lowercase.ext` — machine/config files (config.toml, settings.json, hooks.json)
51	
52	## Key Governance Files
53	
54	- `!/CONSTITUTION.md` — canonical vault governance (supersedes all agent shims)
55	- `!/AGENTS.md` — canonical agent registry, capability tiers, boundary rules
56	- `!/DECISIONS.md` — additive-only confirmed decision log
57	- `!/VAULT-CONVENTIONS.md` — shared naming/frontmatter/structure conventions
58	- `!/!/!/! The world is quiet here/DOCKET.md` — live coordination board
59	- `AGENTS.md` (root) — thin cross-tool pointer, auto-loaded by Codex/Copilot/Qodo
60	- `swarm.json` (root) — machine-readable swarm registry
61	
62	## Active Automation
63	
64	- `idaho_leg_scraper.py` — daily 6 AM MT, commits legislature bill data to main
65	- `sort_audit.py` — weekly Monday 6 AM UTC vault structure audit
66	- Wayback preservation — weekly Monday 8 AM UTC
67	- `auto-pr.yml` — auto-creates PRs from `claude/*` branches (note: did not fire for claude/agent-dotfolder-architecture on 2026-03-28 — investigate)
68	
69	## Local Tooling (as of 2026-03-28)
70	
71	Installed via Scoop (no admin required):
72	- `gh` 2.89.0 — GitHub CLI, authenticated as loganfinney27
73	- `node` 24.14.1 LTS — via scoop nodejs-lts (shims not auto-created; added to PATH via scoop/apps/nodejs-lts/current)
74	- `npm` 11.12.1 — bundled with Node
75	- `claude` 2.1.86 — Claude Code CLI (npm global install)
76	- `jq` 1.8.1 — JSON processor
77	
78	Scoop shims path: `~\scoop\shims` (added to Windows user PATH automatically).
79	Node path workaround: `export PATH="$PATH:/c/Users/loganf/scoop/apps/nodejs-lts/current"` — run `scoop reset nodejs-lts` from PowerShell to fix shims permanently.
80	
81	## Open PRs / Pending Logan Action (as of 2026-03-28)
82	
83	- **PR #78** — `claude/agent-dotfolder-architecture` — agent dotfolder architecture. Ready for Logan to review and merge.
84	
85	## Pending Decisions for Logan
86	
87	- Fictive persona roles for `.bartimaeus/`, `.zagreus/`, `.persephone/` — placeholder text in place
88	- Google Cloud / Gemini CLI integration — deferred from 2026-03-23; role still undefined
89	- Several DECISIONS.md entries may still be awaiting review
90	

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>
